display.purpose: One dominant proposition per hero or chapter.

body.purpose: Readable enterprise explanations capped around 70 characters.

label.purpose: Operational metadata, sequence, state, and controls.

shadows.name: navigation-ambient
shadows.purpose: Separates persistent navigation from moving content.

motion.name: flow-expo
motion.purpose: Section reveals and directional interaction feedback.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Focus, hover, and small state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: High-contrast action for Snapshot and booking decisions.

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet secondary path that preserves hierarchy.

components.name: System Panel
components.description: Large instrument surface for an operating model, not a decorative card.
components.css: .ds-system-panel{display:grid;place-items:center;min-height:240px;padding:24px;border:1px solid rgba(245,237,222,.16);border-radius:18px;background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%,rgba(201,88,44,.22),transparent 45%),#1a1612;color:#f5edde;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace}.ds-system-panel strong{font:800 52px 'Cabinet Grotesk',sans-serif}.ds-system-panel span,.ds-system-panel small{color:#e27a4d;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.08em}

components.name: Navigation Capsule
components.description: Persistent website orientation with restrained ambient depth.
components.css: .ds-nav{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:24px;padding:8px 12px 8px 20px;border:1px solid rgba(245,237,222,.16);border-radius:999px;background:#1a1612;color:#f5edde;box-shadow:0 22px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.28);font:400 12px 'DM Mono',monospace}.ds-nav strong{margin-right:auto;font:800 16px 'Cabinet Grotesk',sans-serif}.ds-nav a:hover{color:#e27a4d}.ds-nav button{border:1px solid #c9582c;border-radius:999px;padding:10px 14px;background:transparent;color:#f5edde}.ds-nav a:focus-visible,.ds-nav button:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #e27a4d;outline-offset:3px}

narrative.overview: Nova Nuggets V2 feels like entering a live operating model for an agent-enabled organisation. The experience is dark, warm, precise, and spatial. It is immersive because the system reveals itself through depth, motion, and interaction, not because content is hidden behind spectacle.
keyCharacteristics: One dominant visual idea per viewport

rules.name: Signal Scarcity
rules.body: Terra and ember identify action or change.

rules.name: Evidence Green
rules.body: Moss may only represent a verified state.

rules.name: Three Voices
rules.body: Display sells the decision, body explains it, mono proves or controls it.

rules.name: Structural Depth
rules.body: A panel earns elevation only when it represents a distinct operating layer.

dos: Do move every route through Diagnose, Design, Deploy, Operate, and Prove.
Do use real artifacts and system boundaries as imagery.
Do begin with a locally controlled first workflow.
donts: Don't use generic AI tool marketing.
Don't build repetitive SaaS card grids or nested glass panels.
Don't hijack scrolling or ignore reduced motion.
